modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Directed Student Learning format missing information in Digital Measures

full_description_text:  
The new format for Directed Student Learning is not displaying all the expected information. This issue was encountered while accessing Digital Measures. The technician noticed that some data points were absent, which may affect reporting and analysis.
short_description: Directed Student Learning format missing information in Digital Measures
description: The new format for Directed Student Learning is not displaying all the expected information. This issue was encountered while accessing Digital Measures. The technician noticed that some data points were absent, which may affect reporting and analysis.
